description: A designed dark graphic headed 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with the date '1/26/2025' and 'Omaha, NE'. It shows a faint background of handcuffs, white text reading 'Venezuelan National', and a 'CRIME:' line reading 'TdA gang member'. An ICE seal sits at lower left and a red 'OMAHA' tab at right.
